issues.title: Error: EMFILE: too many open files, open '…\mindstone-rebel\mcp\super-mcp-router.json'
issues.message: Anchor issue for the EMFILE fd-exhaustion class: the Rebel desktop process runs out of file descriptors on current builds (0.4.45), after which every fs.open/spawn fails. Same-user cross-fingerprint correlation confirmed (user 324218bb… hit EMFILE on super-mcp config read, analytics-storage.json, model calls, and fluidaudiocli spawn within the same hours on 2026-06-10).
issues.severity_reason: Escalated this run, overriding prior env-noise classification: events on current stable 0.4.45 the day of triage, multi-user (60+ across sibling fingerprints REBEL-52P/5Q6/5CZ/52A/5CR/632/67J/67H/67G), win32+darwin, and cascades into user-visible failures (transcription start fails, model turns fail). Investigate the fd leak (or add fd-count diagnostics at the EMFILE capture sites); siblings should close with the same fix.

issues.title: Error: spawn /Applications/Mindstone Rebel.app/Contents/Resources/fluidaudiocli EMFILE
issues.message: New 2026-06-10 member of the EMFILE class: spawning the bundled fluidaudiocli fails with EMFILE, surfacing 'Failed to start transcription' to the user (REBEL-67G toast). Same user/time window as the REBEL-WC burst — symptom of the shared fd-exhaustion root cause, listed here for the user-visible repro path.
issues.severity_reason: User-visible failure path of the EMFILE class (transcription won't start, error toast). Fix via the REBEL-WC class investigation, not separately.
